business_question: Which promotions generated the highest incremental sales?
business_context: Marketing teams want to understand promotion effectiveness and maximize ROI.

aggregation_logic.Promotion ROI: incremental sales divided by promotion spend

sql_answer:
SELECT
    PROMOTION_ID,
    SUM(INCREMENTAL_SALES_AMOUNT) AS INCREMENTAL_SALES,
    ROUND(SUM(INCREMENTAL_SALES_AMOUNT)/SUM(PROMOTION_COST),2) AS ROI
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_PROMOTION_PERFORMANCE
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY INCREMENTAL_SALES DESC;
